name: Toggle NoClip
description: Toggles NoClip mode, allowing players to fly and pass through objects.

name: Toggle Item Condition
description: Toggles degradation of tools and weapons based on usage.

name: Reset Puzzles
description: Resets all keycard puzzles in monuments, including their loot.

name: Break Held Item
description: Breaks the current item in the hands of the player who entered the command.

name: Debug Camera
description: Activates a free camera with controls for movement, rotation, zoom, and camera speed.
